name: Q4. How does a law firm actually gain visibility in AI?

mainEntity.name: Q4. How does a law firm actually gain visibility in AI?

acceptedAnswer.text: A law firm gains visibility in AI by having their information structured, contextualized, and published in ways that AI systems can easily crawl, understand, and trust. This involves creating AI-readable data, building authority around specific case types and cities, and continuously expanding and refreshing this data across trusted platforms.
